name: sigil-api
description: Sigil Protocol registration API — served via the Next.js app (demo/ui). See demo/ui/app/api/v1/passport/ for the route handlers.

scripts.dev: echo 'API endpoints are served by the Next.js app in demo/ui. Run: cd demo/ui && pnpm dev'
scripts.build: echo 'No separate build — API is part of demo/ui Next.js app'
scripts.start: echo 'Start the Next.js app: cd demo/ui && pnpm start'
